allow:
Bash(# Add Secrets.swift file reference
sed -i '' '/A01234567890123456789051 \/\* Extensions\.swift \*\//a\
		A01234567890123456786651 /* Secrets.swift */ = {isa = PBXFileReference; lastKnownFileType = sourcecode.swift; path = Services/Secrets.swift; sourceTree = "<group>"; };
' RoomFinderAI.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj

# Add OpenAIClient.swift file reference  
sed -i '' '/A01234567890123456786651 \/\* Secrets\.swift \*\//a\
		A01234567890123456786510 /* OpenAIClient.swift */ = {isa = PBXFileReference; lastKnownFileType = sourcecode.swift; path = Services/OpenAIClient.swift; sourceTree = "<group>"; };
' RoomFinderAI.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj

# Add Secrets.swift to Sources build phase
sed -i '' '/A01234567890123456789052 \/\* Extensions\.swift in Sources \*\//a\
		A01234567890123456786652 /* Secrets.swift in Sources */ = {isa = PBXBuildFile; fileRef = A01234567890123456786651 /* Secrets.swift */; };
' RoomFinderAI.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj

# Add OpenAIClient.swift to Sources build phase
sed -i '' '/A01234567890123456786652 \/\* Secrets\.swift in Sources \*\//a\
		A01234567890123456786512 /* OpenAIClient.swift in Sources */ = {isa = PBXBuildFile; fileRef = A01234567890123456786510 /* OpenAIClient.swift */; };
' RoomFinderAI.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj)

Bash(# Copy main app files
cp "RoomFinderAI/RoomFinderAIApp.swift" "RoomFinderAI-IOS/Project/RoomFinderAI/"
cp "RoomFinderAI/ContentView.swift" "RoomFinderAI-IOS/Project/RoomFinderAI/" 2>/dev/null || echo "ContentView.swift not found - will create basic one"

# Copy Services
cp "RoomFinderAI/Services/Secrets.swift" "RoomFinderAI-IOS/Project/RoomFinderAI/Services/"
cp "RoomFinderAI/Services/OpenAIClient.swift" "RoomFinderAI-IOS/Project/RoomFinderAI/Services/"

# Create missing Services files that the project expects
touch "RoomFinderAI-IOS/Project/RoomFinderAI/Services/"{SupabaseService.swift,AuthViewModel.swift,ListingsViewModel.swift,ChatViewModel.swift,NetworkManager.swift})

Bash(# Copy main app files from the correct location
cp "RoomFinderAI-IOS/Project/Source/RoomFinderAI/RoomFinderAIApp.swift" "RoomFinderAI-IOS/Project/RoomFinderAI/" 2>/dev/null || echo "Main app file not found, will create"

# Copy the corrected files I created earlier
cp "RoomFinderAI-IOS/Project/Source/RoomFinderAI/Config/Secrets.swift" "RoomFinderAI-IOS/Project/RoomFinderAI/Services/"
cp "RoomFinderAI-IOS/Project/Source/RoomFinderAI/Config/SupabaseEnvironment.swift" "RoomFinderAI-IOS/Project/RoomFinderAI/Services/" 2>/dev/null || echo "SupabaseEnvironment not needed")
